title: fagelia cana
intro: Fagelia cana, also known as Fagelia cana, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a shrub-like plant that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Fagelia cana include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Fagelia cana include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, with herbal preparations often taking the form of infusions, decoctions, and topical creams.
